nasb.text: So the Jews were saying, “Surely He will not kill Himself, will He, since He says, ‘Where I am going, you cannot come’?”

esv.text: So the Jews said, “Will he kill himself, since he says, ‘Where I am going, you cannot come’?”

cnv.text: 於是猶太人說：“他說‘我去的地方，你們不能到’，難道他要自殺嗎？”

ccb.text: 犹太人说：“祂说祂去的地方我们不能去，难道祂想自杀吗？”

csbs.text: 那些犹太人就说：“他说‘我去的地方，你们不能去’，难道他要自杀吗？”
